task_completion.description: Create the three specified chronological collections
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the left pane of the Zotero window, three new collections are visible under 'My Library': 'Pre-1950 Foundations', '1950-1999 Classical', and '2000s and Beyond'.

task_completion.description: Assign the correct papers to the 'Pre-1950 Foundations' collection
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'Pre-1950 Foundations' collection is selected, the middle pane shows exactly 5 papers (Einstein 1905, Turing 1936, Church 1936, Shannon 1948, Shannon-Weaver 1949). The status bar at the bottom should indicate '5 items'.

task_completion.description: Assign the correct papers to the '1950-1999 Classical' collection
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the '1950-1999 Classical' collection is selected, the middle pane shows exactly 5 papers (Turing 1950, Huffman 1952, Watson-Crick 1953, Dijkstra 1959, McCarthy 1960). The status bar at the bottom should indicate '5 items'.

task_completion.description: Assign the correct papers to the '2000s and Beyond' collection
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the '2000s and Beyond' collection is selected, the middle pane shows exactly 8 papers (Krizhevsky 2012, Goodfellow 2014, LeCun 2015, He 2016, Silver 2016, Vaswani 2017, Devlin 2019, Brown 2020). The status bar at the bottom should indicate '8 items'.

task_completion.description: Ensure every paper is assigned to exactly one collection
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent systematically moves all 18 items into the collections without duplicating them. This can be verified if the 'Unfiled Items' folder in the left pane is shown to be empty, or if the sum of items across the three collections is exactly 18.

integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero GUI to organize the library
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the Zotero application window, right-clicking to create collections, and dragging/dropping items.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to modify the Zotero SQLite database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing sqlite3 commands or python scripts modifying the zotero.sqlite file.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely sorted the items based on publication year
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen looking at the 'Date' column in Zotero or sorting by it to select the correct ranges of papers before moving them.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The library contains exactly 18 papers. Correct categorization: 1. Pre-1950 Foundations (5 papers): Einstein (1905), Turing (1936), Church (1936), Shannon (1948), Shannon-Weaver (1949). 2. 1950-1999 Classical (5 papers): Turing (1950), Huffman (1952), Watson-Crick (1953), Dijkstra (1959), McCarthy (1960). 3. 2000s and Beyond (8 papers): Krizhevsky (2012), Goodfellow (2014), LeCun (2015), He (2016), Silver (2016), Vaswani (2017), Devlin (2019), Brown (2020).
